body.content: Site-416 became one of the oldest SCP:RP communities

As of *5 April 2026,* **Site-416 marked its 4th anniversary.** It has been a long journey for both management and moderation, reflecting years of growth and learning. Over time, the community has grown to over 12,000 members and __stands as one of the oldest communities in SCP:RP that is still running today.__
"Hell, I never thought we’d ever be capable of achieving almost 12,000 members for a discord server. "
